Textbook PDFs

The complete book chapters in classic academic format

Download individual chapters or the full book. Each PDF uses Georgia serif typography with a clean, print-friendly layout including CMO Perspective boxes and Key Takeaways.

📖 About These PDFs

These are full textbook chapters from The Future of Product Marketing: The Practitioner's Guide to the Agentic Era by Daniel Yu with Chris O'Hara. Each chapter includes the CMO Perspective and Key Takeaways sections. The curriculum pages on this site provide summaries; these PDFs contain the complete text.

The Future of Product Marketing • futureofpmm.com
